__comment: Claude-only: permissions restrict what Bash commands Claude can run in this repo. PostToolUse hook runs lint after every file write to catch problems immediately. No Copilot equivalent — this is a Claude Code-specific primitive. See https://docs.anthropic.com/claude/docs/claude-code-settings for reference.

hooks.command: cd api && npm run lint --silent 2>&1 | head -20 || true
